tagline: Enterprise x402 Agentic Web Scraper — SSE MCP Server
description: Aetheris-MCP is an enterprise-grade Server-Sent Events (SSE) Model Context Protocol server providing AI agents with high-fidelity, ad-free Markdown web scraping protected by an on-chain x402 micropayment interceptor. Agents pay USDC on Base per scrape. Content is stripped of scripts, styles, and ads by JSDOM before delivery. Bring Your Own Key for inference. Render-ready with one-click deploy.

architecture.scraper: JSDOM — deep DOM sanitization, strips scripts/styles/ads, outputs clean Markdown
architecture.payment: ethers.js — validates ERC-20 USDC transfers on Base Mainnet

payment.validation: ethers.js — verifies transaction hash on-chain before releasing content

environment_variables.USDC_CONTRACT_ADDRESS: ERC-20 USDC contract address on Base
environment_variables.MERCHANT_WALLET_ADDRESS: Your EVM public key to receive payments

deployment.method: render.yaml Blueprint — New → Blueprint → connect forked repo → auto-deploy

client_sdk.description: Official TypeScript SDK that auto-intercepts and settles 402 challenges
client_sdk.note: Agents should NOT connect manually — use the SDK

scraping_flow: Agent connects to /sse endpoint via Aetheris MCP Client SDK
Agent requests a URL via MCP tool call
SDK intercepts challenge, signs USDC transfer on Base
JSDOM scrapes the target URL, sanitizes DOM, extracts Markdown
Clean Markdown context returned to agent
target_users: AI agents that need clean, ad-free web content for RAG or context
Developers deploying MCP servers with monetized scraping
Enterprises wanting one-click Render deployment with BYOK inference
